title: Violation of bond requirements
doc_html:
§176.  Violation of bond requirements

Whoever violates R.S. 45:173 through R.S. 45:177 shall be fined not more than five hundred dollars, or imprisoned not more than six months, or both, and each day of operation in violation of the above provisions shall be a separate offense.
doc_text:
§176.  Violation of bond requirements
Whoever violates R.S. 45:173 through R.S. 45:177 shall be fined not more than five hundred dollars, or imprisoned not more than six months, or both, and each day of operation in violation of the above provisions shall be a separate offense.
